response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent infrastructure (MCP), directly matching the primary stack and the AI agent development requirement. Prior Optilyz role used TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB — strong overlap with primary stack and cloud/database requirements. Multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, PHP, Swift) satisfies polyglot requirement, though Kotlin and Python are not explicitly listed. Docker and Kubernetes experience present via GISCollective. Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest, and React experience is limited to one role. Strong TDD/craftsmanship background (RIDE Capital, workshops, Fluent-Asserts) aligns with code quality expectations. CS degree satisfied. Communication skills evidenced by talks and workshops.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js, AWS, MongoDB, React
Direct AI agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong testing/TDD background — workshops, libraries, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python not listed in skills despite being requested
React experience appears limited to one role (Optilyz)

key_factors.factor: Senior experience depth and polyglot background
Missing Nest.js / Vitest / Kotlin / Python specifics

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer whose current work directly overlaps with the primary stack and the AI-agent requirement that often disqualifies otherwise strong applicants. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot adaptability and craftsmanship track record. Strong interview signal.
